CustomField.description: This compares OBC from User Owner and Interaction to determine if the Owner is not of same company so it can be reassigned. True=Record is OK, False= Reassign record
CustomField.formula: OR( TEXT(Owner:User.Owned_by_Company__c) = TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) ,CONTAINS( Owner:Queue.QueueName, TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c)) ,TEXT(PKI_Queue__r.Owned_By_Company__c) = TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) ,TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) = 'TBD' ,TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) = null )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This compares OBC from User Owner and Interaction to determine if the Owner is not of same company so it can be reassigned. True=Record is OK, False= Reassign record
CustomField.label: fxIsSameOBC
